description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named litecli that runs on every pull request, excluding changes to markdown files and the AUTHORS file. The workflow consists of two jobs: tests and tests-no-extras. The tests job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy across Python 3.9 to 3.13, checking out the repository, setting up uv and Python, installing dependencies with uv sync, and running unit tests with tox. The tests-no-extras job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.13, performing similar steps but without extras.
